title: Microsoft Patches 200 Vulnerabilities

title: Adobe Patches 123 Vulnerabilities
desc: Nearly half of the security holes, most allowing arbitrary code execution, have been fixed in Adobe’s Experience Manager product.

title: OpenSSL Patches High-Severity Vulnerability Found With AI
desc: A total of 18 vulnerabilities have been patched in the latest OpenSSL releases, including many that were potentially discovered by AI.
